top_signals.title: India Private Banks See Corporate Loans Rise as Bond Yields Climb
top_signals.summary: Managements sounded fairly confident that credit demand will hold up.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Chinese Traders Unwind Leveraged Bets at Fastest Pace Since 2016
top_signals.summary: Chinese stock traders unwound leveraged positions at the fastest pace since the 2015–2016 market crash on Friday, as fears that the AI-driven rally had become overstretched triggered a global equities rout.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Allbridge pauses cross-chain bridge after $1.65M exploit
top_signals.summary: The attacker allegedly used a flash loan and rapid swaps to manipulate the bridge’s stablecoin exchange rate.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
